title: Pellas Agri
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Pellas_Agri.jpg]] |name=Pellas Agri
Pellas Agri ("Coros Telari") about to be shot in the head by a [[House Mecetti|Mecetti]] thug |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[House Pelagia]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Pellas Agri''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[House Pelagia]] deep cover operative and associate of [[Janna Pallask]]. He used the alias "Coros Telari" while on assignment. When he was young his father was unjustly imprisoned on the orders of a [[House Mecetti]] nobleman and subsequently died in custody. Ever since then he trained himself in the arts of stealth and secrecy which he used to strike back at House Mecetti. ==Biography== During the period of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] "Coros Telari" uncovered evidence that House Mecetti was engaged in anti-Imperial activities. He gained the information, which came in the form of a file, while on a mission on the Mecetti capital world of [[Obulette]]. House Mecetti obviously did not want such potentially damaging information in the hands of their rival House Pelagia. He smuggled this "Mecetti File" to [[Lamuir IV]] hoping to pass it onto Janna Pallask for final transit to House Pelagia authorities. When he arrived at docking bay 10 of the [[Lamuir IV Spaceport|spaceport]] he was apprehended by agents loyal to House Mecetti. He traveled to the [[Lamuir system/Legends|Lamuir system]] on the freighter ship the ''[[Starseeker]]''. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=The Mecetti File|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Agri, Pellas}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Spies]]
